---
title: "Tcellex_Validation3"
author: "Ashita Jawali"
date: "2026-04-24"
output: html_document
---


```{r cars}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

seurat_obj <- readRDS("C:/Users/ashit/Desktop/Research Paper/Tcellex/Validation/integrated_seurat.rds")

cat("Stage 2: Mapping Histology...\n")

# Map histology
histology_map <- c(
  p1="LUAD", p2="LUAD", p3="LUAD",
  p4="LUSC", p5="LUSC", p6="LUSC", p7="LUSC"
)

# Histology mapping (SAFE)
metadata$histology <- histology_map[metadata$Patient]
seurat_obj@meta.data <- cbind(seurat_obj@meta.data, metadata["histology"])

# QC
seurat_obj[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(seurat_obj, pattern = "^MT-")
seurat_obj <- subset(seurat_obj, subset = nFeature_RNA > 200 & percent.mt < 5)

# Get counts (Seurat v5 fix)
counts <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj, layer = "counts")

# Normalize like Scanpy
counts_norm <- t( t(counts) / Matrix::colSums(counts) * 1e4 )
counts_log <- log1p(counts_norm)

# Set normalized data
seurat_obj <- SetAssayData(
  seurat_obj,
  layer = "data",
  new.data = counts_log
)

# Match HVG Selection
seurat_obj <- FindVariableFeatures(
  seurat_obj,
  selection.method = "vst",   # closest to scanpy flavor
  nfeatures = 2000
)

# ❗ DO NOT over-scale (Scanpy doesn’t fully center like Seurat)
seurat_obj <- ScaleData(seurat_obj, do.scale = FALSE)

# -------------------------
# ✅ MATCH PCA + NEIGHBORS + UMAP
# -------------------------
seurat_obj <- RunPCA(seurat_obj, npcs = 50)

seurat_obj <- FindNeighbors(seurat_obj, dims = 1:30)

# Match Scanpy UMAP behavior more closely
seurat_obj <- RunUMAP(
  seurat_obj,
  dims = 1:30,
  n.neighbors = 15,
  min.dist = 0.5,
  metric = "cosine"
)

# -------------------------
# Visualization
# -------------------------
p1 <- DimPlot(seurat_obj, group.by = "histology")
p2 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj, features = "CD3D")

ggsave("umap_validation.png", p1 + p2, width = 10, height = 5)

saveRDS(seurat_obj,
        file = "C:/Users/ashit/Desktop/Research Paper/Tcellex/Validation/final_seurat.rds")

cat("SUCCESS\n")

```
